title: feat: enable image-to-image (reference images) for Grok Imagine and Grok Imagine Pro
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Grok learns to look
gist.blurb: Grok Imagine and Grok Imagine Pro now accept reference images. Hand it up to five pictures and it'll use them to guide your generation, no extra wiring required.
gist.summary: Added image-to-image support for Grok Imagine and Grok Imagine Pro by integrating xAI's image editing endpoint.
gist.impact: You can now pass up to 5 reference images to Grok models via the API or the Play UI to guide your generations.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee showing a reference photo to the Monitor Robot, who is painting a new image based on it. Represents the image-to-image capability being added to the Grok models.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding up a small framed photograph as a reference for a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot has square pixel eyes and is painting on a digital canvas, using the bee's picture as inspiration. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot holding up a small framed photograph as a reference for a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head. The robot has square pixel eyes and is painting on a digital canvas, using the bee's picture as inspiration. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, chunky sprites, emotionally warm.
